description: Clean markdown rendering pipeline: remove strip_tags from storage, fix thread panel, add security tests

steps.name: Add XSS security tests for render-time sanitization
steps.description: Add acceptance tests proving: (1) stored <script> payload is stripped by Scrubber when markdown ON, (2) stored <script> payload is escaped by HEEx when markdown OFF (flag disabled). These tests must pass BEFORE removing strip_tags to prove render-time protection is sufficient.
acceptance_criteria: Test: message containing '<script>alert(1)</script>' renders without <script> tag when markdown_rendering enabled
Test: message containing '<script>alert(1)</script>' renders as escaped text when markdown_rendering disabled
Test: message containing '' is stripped by Scrubber
Test: blockquote with '>' renders correctly through full pipeline (strip_tags → unescape → markdown)

steps.name: Remove strip_tags from all 7 storage paths
steps.description: Remove HtmlSanitizeEx.strip_tags/1 from all message storage paths. Content is stored raw — XSS is handled at render time by the Scrubber (markdown ON) or HEEx auto-escaping (markdown OFF). Keep content validation (length, non-empty) but stop mutating content.
acceptance_criteria: strip_tags is not called in messages.ex send_message/3, edit_message/3, send_reply/4
strip_tags is not called in dms.ex send_dm/3, accept_dm_request/2
strip_tags is not called in channel_server.ex handle_call(:send_message), validate_content/1
Content validation (length check, non-empty) still works
All existing tests pass
XSS security tests from 01-01 still pass

steps.name: Fix thread panel markdown_enabled propagation
steps.description: Pass markdown_enabled through to ThreadPanelComponent and its message_bubble calls. Currently the thread panel renders markdown as plain text because the flag is never passed.
acceptance_criteria: ThreadPanelComponent accepts markdown_enabled assign
Parent message bubble (line ~62) receives markdown_enabled
Reply message bubbles (line ~79) receive markdown_enabled
Index LiveView passes markdown_enabled to ThreadPanelComponent
All existing tests pass

steps.name: Add render path audit and raw() safety check
steps.description: Audit all render paths for Message.content to verify markdown_enabled is passed everywhere. Add a test that greps for raw() usage to ensure it only appears in Markdown.to_html/1.
acceptance_criteria: All render paths for message content are documented and verified
Test verifying raw() is only called within Markdown.to_html/1 pipeline
No undiscovered render paths exist

steps.name: Create backfill task to decode HTML entities in existing messages
steps.description: Release task that iterates messages in batches, decrypting content via Cloak, running unescape_html on it, re-encrypting, and updating both encrypted_content and search_content. Must include sampling checkpoint for Cloak round-trip verification.
acceptance_criteria: Release task decodes HTML entities in batches
Sampling checkpoint verifies Cloak round-trip integrity before bulk processing
search_content is updated alongside encrypted content
Task is idempotent (safe to re-run)
backfill_embeddings documented as required after content backfill

steps.name: Remove unescape_html from Markdown.to_html/1
steps.description: After backfill migration confirms all data is clean, remove the unescape_html/1 function and its call in to_html/1. Remove the pipeline round-trip tests that tested strip_tags → unescape → markdown since strip_tags is gone.
acceptance_criteria: unescape_html/1 removed from Markdown module
Pipeline tests updated to test raw content → markdown (no strip_tags round-trip)
All tests pass
Clean end-to-end pipeline with no compensating hacks
